design_consultation_scope: auth-flow state machine component (idle, pending, error, signed-in)
rationale: S2 introduces the first multi-surface design work in the fork: four-tab IA, marginalia rail primitive (structural geometry per DESIGN.md), and Gemini OAuth UX flow. /plan-design-review (used for S1) is undersized for IA. /design-consultation is the formal vehicle for DESIGN.md component amendments. Must run in parallel with WS-1 finish, not sequentially.
